generated_oml:
// Physical Component
instance RobotVerticalAxisComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of the MABI MAX 100 six‑axis industrial robot, comprising a permanent‑magnet synchronous motor, gear transmission, and cycloidal gearbox used for machining."
]

// Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the vertical axis.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxEncoderSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder located behind the gearbox of the vertical axis.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring the motor phase current I_M.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance RobotControllerSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Robot controller providing measured input current and output shaft angle.",
    DTDFVocab:producedData ControllerDataTransmitted
]

// DataTransmitted (from sensors)
instance MotorEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoderSensor
]

instance GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxEncoderSensor
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance ControllerDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom RobotControllerSensor
]

// Raw Data (from DataTransmitted)
instance MotorEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position r_M measured by the motor encoder.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance GearboxEncoderAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position r_G measured by the secondary encoder behind the gearbox.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor phase current I_M.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ControllerInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Input current reported by the robot controller.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance ControllerOutputAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Output shaft angle reported by the robot controller.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData ControllerDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTEnabler, MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

// Derived Data
instance DerivedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Torque computed from motor current and encoder data.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular velocity derived from successive encoder angle measurements.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance AccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular acceleration derived from angular velocity data.",
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

// Enablers
instance SysMLEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML toolchain used for system architecture modeling.",
    DTDFVocab:enables SysMLModelUsageService
]

instance MatlabSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink environment for executable simulation and friction identification.",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for live streaming of sensor time‑series to the digital shadow.",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, RealTimeVisualizationService, FrictionParameterUpdateService
]

instance DashboardEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Custom dashboard for real‑time visualization of measured versus simulated data.",
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AASEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell providing standardized asset description and data storage.",
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionParameterUpdateService
]

// Services
instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic and viscous friction in the gearbox.",
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionParametersInsight
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of measured vs simulated data on the dashboard.",
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionParameterUpdateService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Generation of updated friction parameters for improved motion‑control accuracy.",
    DTDFVocab:provides UpdateControllerParameters
]

instance SysMLModelUsageService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service exposing SysML model insights for system engineering.",
    DTDFVocab:provides SysMLModelInsight
]

// Insights / Actions
instance FrictionParametersInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Derived static, kinetic and viscous friction parameters for the gearbox."
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visual comparison indicating model fidelity between measured and simulated signals."
]

instance UpdateControllerParameters : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatically feed updated friction parameters back into the robot controller to refine model‑based control algorithms.",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SysMLModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight obtained from SysML modeling activities."
]

// Models
instance SysMLVerticalAxisModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML block definition and internal block diagram describing motor, gear transmission and cycloidal gearbox.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLEnabler
]

instance MatlabSimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink executable model of the permanent‑magnet synchronous motor.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MatlabSimulinkGearwheelModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the gearwheel within the transmission.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance MatlabSimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB/Simulink model of the cycloidal gearbox.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Analytical friction model combining Coulomb and viscous terms.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model capturing velocity‑dependent transition.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dahl friction model describing pre‑sliding displacement behavior.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "LuGre friction model for dynamic friction phenomena.",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MatlabSimulinkEnabler
]

// Environment grouping
instance DigitalTwinEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains RobotVerticalAxisComponent,
                MotorEncoderSensor,
                GearboxEncoderSensor,
                MotorCurrentSensor,
                RobotControllerSensor,
                MQTTEnabler,
                DashboardEnabler,
                AASEnabler,
                MatlabSimulinkEnabler,
                SysMLEnabler
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real‑time, continuous operation during robot runtime; data are captured and processed on‑line to enable immediate friction model updates."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose‑driven digital shadow consisting of a Purpose entity (FrictionDerivation), an Asset entity (Mabi robot), DataTrace and DataPoint entities for measured and simulated signals, Processing components that run simulation models, and links to sources; all instantiated according to the Digital Shadow Reference Model."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the operated stage of the physical system, providing run‑time monitoring and model updating during normal robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Traceability of each data point to its source and processing model, continuous comparison of simulated friction‑free behaviour with measured data, and dynamic updating of both white‑box and black‑box friction models to maintain model accuracy over wear and operating conditions."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "One‑way data transmission from PT to DT via MQTT protocol; data are annotated with metadata and linked to processing components within the digital shadow framework."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Use of Asset Administration Shells (AAS) as an Industry 4.0 standard, SysML for engineering models, and the Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM) for consistent architecture."
]
